note: Submodule of quicktabs; adds one TabRenderer. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), grounded in the 4.3.x docs.

evals.prompt: I want a Quick Tabs instance to display as a jQuery UI accordion. Which submodule do I enable and which renderer id does it add?
evals.expected_output: Enable quicktabs_accordion, which registers the accordion_tabs TabRenderer; select the accordion renderer on the quicktabs_instance.

evals.prompt: What options does the Quick Tabs accordion renderer expose?
evals.expected_output: The accordion_tabs renderer options are `collapsible` (bool, allow all panels closed) and `heightStyle` (auto | fill | content).

evals.prompt: Which modules must be present for the Quick Tabs accordion renderer to work?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the block module and jquery_ui_accordion (plus the parent quicktabs module); it loads the jquery_ui_accordion/accordion library.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure the Quick Tabs accordion — does the submodule add its own admin page?
evals.expected_output: No separate UI; configure it in the parent Quick Tabs admin at Structure > Quick Tabs (/admin/structure/quicktabs) by choosing the accordion renderer. The submodule adds no config entity, permission, or Drush command.
